name: Vanilla Tilt — 3D Card Tilt
description: Smooth mouse-tracking 3D tilt on cards with glare overlay and gyroscope support. Add data-tilt to any card element.
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vanilla-tilt@1.8.1/dist/vanilla-tilt.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    VanillaTilt.init(document.querySelectorAll('.card, .service-card, .feature-card, [data-tilt]'), {
      max: 12,
      speed: 500,
      glare: true,
      'max-glare': 0.25,
      scale: 1.03
    });
  });
</script>
